AuthService.code: Handles login and authentication. Includes OAuth flow and session validation.

task.description: Fix Android WebView login issue causing missing OAuth state parameter

AuthService.prd: Section 3.2: Users must be able to log in seamlessly across all platforms
AuthService.team_note: Temporary hotfix for Germany demo. Do not refactor before security review.
AuthService.recent_change: Added workaround for WebView stripping OAuth state parameter

PaymentService.code: Handles checkout and payment processing with primary and fallback providers.

task.description: Add fallback payment provider when primary gateway fails

PaymentService.prd: Section 5.1: Payments must be resilient to provider failures
PaymentService.team_note: Fallback provider is expensive, should only trigger on failure

OrderService.code: Manages order creation, tracking and lifecycle.
OrderService.prd: Section 4.0: Orders must be traceable in real-time
OrderService.team_note: Legacy service, partially refactored but still in transition
